action.reasoning: Observation: Iter 7 (CLIP-L/14) failed - val_f1=0.004. Likely the logit adjustment broke training or LR was wrong. Best.pt was overwritten with this bad model. I have 3.9h left, 22 iters. Iter 6's best.pt was 0.091 but is now overwritten. Analysis: Need to retrain CLIP-B/16 (which worked) with the original recipe — no logit adjustment. Per epoch ~6min, can do 12-15 epochs in ~75-90min. Better idea: train at higher resolution (384 with B/16 since CLIP-B/16 has positional embeddings at 224, would need interpolation). Stick with 224 but train longer with better augmentation + careful LR schedule. Decision: Rewrite train.py with the recipe that worked at iter 5 (CLIP-B/16, no logit adj, lr=1e-5, head_lr=1e-4, label smoothing 0.1, cosine), train 12 epochs from scratch.
